untranslatable_reason: Cup with Handle is a visual chart pattern that requires shape recognition (cup-shaped bottom, handle formation, breakout at right cup rim). These geometric properties cannot be expressed using standard price/volume indicators and mathematical operators. Pattern detection requires specialized pattern recognition logic or candlestick geometry analysis not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal contains pattern-specific visual criteria ('cup-shaped bottom', 'handle formation', 'breakout at bottom of right cup rim') that require pattern recognition beyond the available indicators. The timeframe constraint (54-58 days from formation end to breakout in bull/bear markets) and directional breakout (UP) have been partially captured through hold_days_max and entry/exit logic, but the core pattern geometry is untranslatable.
